summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of iMOs public marketing pages completed. All 8 routes tested with all critical features verified working. Mobile responsiveness confirmed. No critical issues found.

issues: Markdown formatting (## and **) is displayed as raw text instead of rendered formatting. Consider using a markdown parser to render headings and bold text properly.

action_items: Minor: Consider rendering markdown in Privacy/Terms pages for better formatting (currently shows raw ## and ** markers)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are defined in code but React Native Web renders TouchableOpacity differently - automated testing with Playwright can use text selectors instead
Mobile hamburger menu state correctly managed with useState hook
Share URLs properly use PROD_BASE constant for app.imosapp.com domain
Active nav highlighting works correctly with gold (#C9A962) color
Sales presentation keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right) works properly
Legal pages correctly fall back to hardcoded content when API returns empty

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, all navigation works

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iMOs public marketing pages tested: /imos (main), /imos/hub, /imos/salespresentation, /imos/features, /imos/pricing, /imos/privacy, /imos/terms. Redirect /imos/presentation → /imos/salespresentation works. Mobile responsive with hamburger menu. Active nav highlighting in gold. Privacy/Terms fetch from API (/api/legal/privacy and /api/legal/terms).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features verified working correctly
